caption: Figure 1: Instance ls 0 (Linear Spike, n=100, first 45 steps shown). The series follows a linear upward trend with Gaussian noise. A single transient spike at t=35 (•) deviates sharply from the local trend before reverting immediately.
description2: The instance of Linear Spike sequence with Gaussian noise shows a sharp deviation from the linear trend followed by immediate reversion, featuring a single transient spike.
description3: Two-panel line chart displays a linear upward trend with Gaussian noise, punctuated by a sharp, transient spike at time step 35.
